crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n409\t        let selected = replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone();\n410\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n411\t    }\n412\t\n413\t    ScatterPlan {\n414\t        chosen_group,\n415\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n416\t        shard_to_node,\n417\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n418\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n419\t    }\n420\t}\n421\t\n422\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n423\t///\n424\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n425\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n426\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n427\t    topology: &Topology,\n428\t    query_seq: u64,\n429\t    rf: usize,\n430\t    shard_count: u32,\n431\t    index: &str,\n432\t    floor: u64,\n433\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n434\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n435\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n436\t\n437\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n438\t\n439\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n440\t        shard_count,\n441\t        group,\n442\t        rf,\n443\t        query_seq,\n444\t        index,\n445\t        floor,\n446\t        version_checker,\n447\t    )?;\n448\t\n449\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n450\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n451\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n452\t        // Filter by version floor, then rotate by query_seq\n453\t        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n454\t            .iter()\n455\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n456\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n457\t                version >= floor\n458\t            })\n459\t            .collect();\n460\t\n461\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n462\t            return None;\n463\t        }\n464\t\n465\t        let selected = eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()];\n466\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n467\t    }\n468\t\n469\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n470\t        chosen_group,\n471\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n472\t        shard_to_node,\n473\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n474\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n475\t    })\n476\t}\n477\t\n478\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n479\t///\n480\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n481\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n482\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n483\t    topology: &Topology,\n484\t    query_seq: u64,\n485\t    rf: usize,\n486\t    shard_count: u32,\n487\t    pinned_group: u32,\n488\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n489\t    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n490\t\n491\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n492\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n493\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n494\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n495\t            continue;\n496\t        }\n497\t        let selected = replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone();\n498\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n499\t    }\n500\t\n501\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n502\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n503\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n504\t        shard_to_node,\n505\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n506\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n507\t    })\n508\t}\n509\t\n510\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n511\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n512\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n513\t    client: &C,\n514\t    req: SearchRequest,\n515\t    topology: &Topology,\n516\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n517\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n518\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n519\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n520\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n521\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n522\t        }\n523\t    }\n524\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n525\t\n526\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n527\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n528\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n529\t\n530\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n531\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n532\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n533\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n534\t            None => {\n535\t                for shard_id in shards {\n536\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n537\t                }\n538\t                continue;\n539\t            }\n540\t        };\n541\t        let client_ref = client;\n542\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n543\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n544\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n545\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n546\t        let span = info_span!(\n547\t            \"scatter_node\",\n548\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n549\t            address = %node.address,\n550\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n551\t        );\n552\t        tasks.push(async move {\n553\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n554\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n555\t        }.instrument(span));\n556\t    }\n557\t\n558\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n559\t\n560\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n561\t        match result {\n562\t            Ok(body) => {\n563\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n564\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n565\t                }\n566\t            }\n567\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n568\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n569\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n570\t            }\n571\t            Err(e) => {\n572\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n573\t            }\n574\t        }\n575\t    }\n576\t\n577\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n578\t\n579\t    match policy {\n580\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n581\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n582\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n583\t            }\n584\t        }\n585\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n586\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n587\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n588\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n589\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n590\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n591\t\n592\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n593\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n594\t\n595\t                    // Try each other replica group\n596\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n597\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n598\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n599\t                        }\n600\t\n601\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n602\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n603\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n604\t                                continue;\n605\t                            }\n606\t\n607\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n608\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n609\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n610\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n611\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n612\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n613\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n614\t                                            break;\n615\t                                        }\n616\t                                        Err(_) => {\n617\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n618\t                                        }\n619\t                                    }\n620\t                                }\n621\t                            }\n622\t\n623\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n624\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n625\t                            }\n626\t                        }\n627\t                    }\n628\t\n629\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n630\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n631\t                    }\n632\t                }\n633\t\n634\t                // Merge fallback results\n635\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n636\t\n637\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n638\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n639\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n640\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n641\t                        shard_pages,\n642\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n643\t                        partial: false,\n644\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n645\t                    });\n646\t                } else {\n647\t                    // Some shards still failed\n648\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n649\t                }\n650\t            }\n651\t        }\n652\t    }\n653\t\n654\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n655\t}\n656\t\n657\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n658\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n659\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n660\t    client: &C,\n661\t    req: SearchRequest,\n662\t    topology: &Topology,\n663\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n664\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n665\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n666\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n667\t\n668\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n669\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n670\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n671\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n672\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n673\t            });\n674\t        }\n675\t    }\n676\t\n677\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n678\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n679\t\n680\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n681\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n682\t        offset: req.offset,\n683\t        limit: req.limit,\n684\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n685\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n686\t        failed_shards,\n687\t    };\n688\t\n689\t    // Span for the merge operation\n690\t    let _span = info_span!(\n691\t        \"merge\",\n692\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n693\t        offset = req.offset,\n694\t        limit = req.limit,\n695\t    ).entered();\n696\t\n697\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n698\t}\n699\t\n700\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n701\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n702\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n703\t\n704\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n705\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n706\t    match query {\n707\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n708\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n709\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n710\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n711\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n712\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n713\t            }\n714\t            terms\n715\t        }\n716\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n717\t    }\n718\t}\n719\t\n720\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n721\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n722\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n723\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n724\t    client: &C,\n725\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n726\t    topology: &Topology,\n727\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n728\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n729\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n730\t    }\n731\t\n732\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n733\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n734\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n735\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n736\t        }\n737\t    }\n738\t\n739\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n740\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n741\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n742\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n743\t            None => continue,\n744\t        };\n745\t        let client_ref = client;\n746\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n747\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n748\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n749\t    }\n750\t\n751\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n752\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n753\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n754\t}\n755\t\n756\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n757\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n758\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n759\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n760\t    client: &C,\n761\t    req: SearchRequest,\n762\t    topology: &Topology,\n763\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n764\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n765\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n766\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n767\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n768\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n769\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n770\t    };\n771\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n772\t    let mut search_req = req;\n773\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n774\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n775\t}\n776\t\n777\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n778\t// Mock client\n779\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n780\t\n781\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n782\tpub struct MockNodeClient {\n783\t    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n784\t    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n785\t    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n786\t    pub delay_ms: u64,\n787\t}\n788\t\n789\timpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n790\t    async fn search_node(\n791\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n792\t    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n793\t        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n794\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n795\t        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n796\t            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n797\t        }))\n798\t    }\n799\t\n800\t    async fn preflight_node(\n801\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n802\t    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n803\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n804\t        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n805\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n806\t        }))\n807\t    }\n808\t\n809\t    async fn write_documents(\n810\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n811\t    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n812\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n813\t        Ok(WriteResponse {\n814\t            success: true,\n815\t            task_uid: Some(1),\n816\t            message: None,\n817\t            code: None,\n818\t            error_type: None,\n819\t        })\n820\t    }\n821\t\n822\t    async fn delete_documents(\n823\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n824\t    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n825\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n826\t        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n827\t            success: true,\n828\t            task_uid: Some(1),\n829\t            message: None,\n830\t            code: None,\n831\t            error_type: None,\n832\t        })\n833\t    }\n834\t\n835\t    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n836\t        &self, node: &NodeId, }\n839\t        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n840\t            success: true,\n841\t            task_uid: Some(1),\n842\t            message: None,\n843\t            code: None,\n844\t            error_type: results: Vec::new(),\n854\t            limit: request.limit,\n855\t            offset: request.offset,\n856\t            total: 0,\n857\t        })\n858\t    }\n859\t\n860\t    fn get_task_status(\n861\t        &self,\n862\t        node: &NodeId,\n863\t        _address: &str,\n864\t        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n865\t    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n866\t        let node = node.clone();\n867\t        let task_uid = _request.task_uid;\n868\t        let error = self.errors.get(&node).cloned();\n869\t        async move {\n870\t            if let Some(err) = error {\n871\t                return Err(err);\n872\t            }\n873\t            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n874\t                task_uid,\n875\t                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n876\t                error: None,\n877\t                error_type: None,\n878\t            })\n879\t        }\n880\t    }\n881\t}\n882\t\n883\t#[cfg(test)]\n884\tmod tests {\n885\t    use super::*;\n886\t    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n887\t\n888\t    fn make_test_topology()        }\n896\t        topo\n897\t    }\n898\t\n899\t    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n900\t        SearchRequest {\n901\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(), query:    }\n906\t\n907\t    #[test]\n908\t    fn test_plan_pure_function() {\n909\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n910\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n911\t   async fn test_sg_rrf() {\n985\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n986\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n987\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n988\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n989\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n990\t        let r = scatter_gather_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n991\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n992\t    }\n993\t\n994\t    #[tokio::test]\n995\t    async fn test_sg_degraded() {\n996\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n997\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n998\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n999\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\"}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1000\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n1001\t        let s = assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n1009\t    }\n1010\t\n1011\t    #[test]\n1012\t    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1013\t        let resp = vec![\n1014\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n1015\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 60.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 4500 })]) },\n1016\t        ];\n1017\t        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&resp);\n1018\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1019\t        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n1020\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1021\t    }\n1022\t\n1023\t    #[test]\n1024\t    fn test_global_idf_empty() {\n1025\t        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&[]);\n1026\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 0);\n1027\t        assert!(g.terms.is_empty());\n1028\t    }\n1029\t\n1030\t    #[tokio::test]\n1031\t    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n1032\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1033\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1034\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1035\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1036\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1037\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1038\t        });\n1039\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1040\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1041\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n1042\t        });\n1043\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1044\t            total_docs: 40000, avg_doc_length: 52.0,\n1045\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 4000 })]),\n1046\t        });\n1047\t        let req = PreflightRequest { index_uid: \"test\".into(), terms: vec![\"search\".into()], filter: None };\n1048\t        let g = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1049\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1050\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"search\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1051\t    }\n1052\t\n1053\t    #[tokio::test]\n1054\t    async fn test_dfs_query_then_fetch() {\n1055\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1056\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1057\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1058\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1059\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1060\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1061\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1062\t        });\n1063\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1064\t        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n1065\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n1066\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1067\t    }\n1068\t\n1069\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1070\t    ///\n1071\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1072\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1073\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1074\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1075\t    ///\n1076\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1077\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1078\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1079\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1080\t    ///\n1081\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1082\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1083\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1084\t    ///\n1085\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1086\t    #[tokio::test]\n1087\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1088\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1089\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1090\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1091\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1092\t\n1093\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3);\n1094\t\n1095\t        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n1096\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1097\t\n1098\t        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n1099\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1100\t            total_docs: 1000,\n1101\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1102\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1103\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n1104\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n1105\t            ]),\n1106\t        });\n1107\t\n1108\t        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n1109\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1110\t            total_docs: 100_000,\n1111\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1112\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1113\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n1114\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n1115\t            ]),\n1116\t        });\n1117\t\n1118\t        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n1119\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1120\t            total_docs: 10,\n1121\t            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n1122\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1123\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1124\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1125\t            ]),\n1126\t        });\n1127\t\n1128\t        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n1129\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1130\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1131\t            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n1132\t            filter: None,\n1133\t        };\n1134\t\n1135\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1136\t\n1137\t        // Verify global aggregation\n1138\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n1139\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n1140\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n1141\t\n1142\t        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n1143\t        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n1144\t        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1145\t        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n1146\t        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n1147\t\n1148\t        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n1149\t        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1150\t        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n1151\t        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n1152\t\n1153\t        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n1154\t        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n1155\t        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n1156\t        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n1157\t        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1158\t        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1159\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n1160\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n1161\t    }\n1162\t\n1163\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n1164\t    #[tokio::test]\n1165\t    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n1166\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1167\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1168\t        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1169\t\n1170\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1171\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1172\t            terms: vec![],\n1173\t            filter: None,\n1174\t        };\n1175\t\n1176\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1177\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n1178\t        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n1179\t    }\n1180\t\n1181\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n1182\t    #[tokio::test]\n1183\t    async fn that to_node_body correctly injects showRankingScore: true and sets limit to offset + limit.\n1222\t    #[test]\n1223\t    fn test_to_node_body_injects_show_ranking_score() {\n1224\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1225\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1226\t            query: Some(\"rust programming\".into()),\n1227\t            offset: 10,\n1228\t            limit: 20,\n1229\t            filter: Some(serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")),\n1230\t            facets: Some(vec![\"category\".into(), \"tags\".into()]),\n1231\t            ranking_score: false, // Client didn't request scores\n1232\t            body: serde_json::json!({\"custom\": \"field\"}),\n1233\t            global_idf: None,\n1234\t        };\n1235\t\n1236\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1237\t\n1238\t        // showRankingScore must be true unconditionally\n1239\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"showRankingScore\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(true)));\n1240\t\n1241\t        // limit must be offset + limit (coordinator pagination)\n1242\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(30)));\n1243\t\n1244\t        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n1245\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1246\t\n1247\t        // query must be set\n1248\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"q\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"rust programming\")));\n1249\t\n1250\t        // filter must be set\n1251\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"filter\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")));\n1252\t\n1253\t        // facets must be set\n1254\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"facets\"), Some(&serde_json::json!([\"category\", \"tags\"])));\n1255\t\n1256\t        // custom body field must be preserved\n1257\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"custom\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"field\")));\n1258\t    }\n1259\t\n1260\t    /// Test that to_node_body works with minimal request.\n1261\t    #[test]\n1262\t    fn test_to_node_body_minimal_request() {\n1263\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1264\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1265\t            query:        let req = SearchRequest {\n1291\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1292\t            query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n1293\t            offset: 100,\n1294\t            limit: 50,\n1295\t            filter: None,\n1296\t            facets: None,\n1297\t            ranking_score: false,\n1298\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1299\t            global_idf: None,\n1300\t        };\n1301\t\n1302\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1303\t\n1304\t        // limit must be offset + limit = 150 (fetch enough for coordinator pagination)\n1305\t Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1309\t    }\n1310\t\n1311\t    /// Test group fallback when primary group has failed nodes.\n1312\t    #[tokio::test]\n1313\t    async fn test_group_fallback_on_partial_failure() {\n1314\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(16, 2, 2);\n1315\t        // Group 0: 2 nodes\n1316\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), \"http://g0-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1317\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-1\".into()), \"http://g0-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1318\t        // Group 1: 2 nodes (healthy fallback targets)\n1319\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), \"http://g1-0:7700\".into(), 1));\n1320\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-1\".into()), \"http://g1-1:7700\".into(), 1));\n1321\t\n1322\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 16); // query_seq=0 → group 0\n1323\t        assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 0);\n1324\t\n1325\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1326\t\n1327\t        // Set up responses: all shards on group 1 nodes return valid data\n1328\t        let response_1 = serde_json::json!({\n1329\t            \"hits\": [{\"id\": \"doc1\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}],\n1330\t            \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1,\n1331\t            \"processingTimeMs\": 5,\n1332\t        });\n1333\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-0\".into()), response_1.clone());\n1334\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g1-1\".into()), response_1);\n1335\t\n1336\t        // All nodes in group 0 fail\n1337\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), shards should succeed via group 1\n1343\t        let result = execute_scatter(plan, &c, req, &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback).await.unwrap();\n1344\t\n1345\t        // Should have succeeded via fallback (group 1)\n1346\t        assert!(!result.partial, \"Fallback should have succeeded\");\n1347\t        assert!(result.failed_shards.is_empty(), \"No shards should have failed after fallback\");\n1348\t        assert!(!result.shard_pages.is_empty(), \"Should have shard pages from fallback\");\n1349\t    }\n1350\t\n1351\t    /// Test group fallback when both groups are down.\n1352\t    #[tokio::test]\n1353\t    async fn test_group_fallback_all_groups_down() {\n1354\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(16, 2, 2);\n1355\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), \"http://g0-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1356\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-1\".into()), \"http://g0-1:7700\".into(), fail\n1364\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-0\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n1365\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-g0-1\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n1366\t serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\n/// Scatter plan: the exact shard→node mapping for a search query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ScatterPlan {\n    pub chosen_group: u32,\n    pub target_shards: Vec<u32>,\n    pub shard_to_node: HashMap<u32, NodeId>,\n    pub deadline_ms: u32,\n    pub hedging_eligible: bool,\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// §15 OP#4: Global-IDF preflight (dfs_query_then_fetch pattern)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Per-term document frequency from a single shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n}\n\n/// Preflight request: gather term-frequency statistics from a shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub terms: Vec<String>,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a shard's preflight query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightResponse {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub term_stats: HashMap<String, TermStats>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global term statistics after coordinator aggregation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalTermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n    pub idf: f64,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global IDF data computed at the coordinator.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalIdf {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub terms: HashMap<String, GlobalTermStats>,\n}\n\nimpl GlobalIdf {\n    /// Aggregate per-shard preflight responses into global IDF.\n    pub fn from_preflight_responses(responses: &[PreflightResponse]) -> Self {\n        let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n        let mut total_length = 0.0f64;\n        let mut term_df: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n        for resp in responses {\n            total_docs += resp.total_docs;\n            total_length += resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n            }\n        }\n\n        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n            total_length / total_docs as f64\n        } else {\n            0.0\n        };\n\n        let n = total_docs as f64;\n        let terms = term_df\n            .into_iter()\n            .map(|(term, df)| {\n                let idf = if df == 0 {\n                    0.0\n                } else {\n                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n                };\n                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Write path: document operations crate::task::NodeTaskStatus {\n        match self.status.as_str() {\n            \"enqueued\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            \"processing\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Processing,\n            \"succeeded\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Succeeded,\n            \"failed\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Failed,\n            _ => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// HTTP client for communicating with a Meilisearch node.\n#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]\npub trait NodeClient: Send + error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Get task status from a node.\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: _request.offset,\n            total: 0,\n        })\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub enum NodeError {\n    Timeout,\n    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n    NetworkError(String),\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct SearchRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub query: Option<String>,\n    pub offset: usize,\n    pub limit: usize,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    pub ranking_score: bool,\n    pub body: Value,\n    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n}\n\nimpl SearchRequest {\n    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n    ///\n    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n    /// data to apply pagination.\n    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n\n        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n\n        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n\n        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n\n        // Ensure query is set\n        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n        }\n\n        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n        }\n\n        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n        }\n\n        body\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\npub struct ScatterResult {\n    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n    pub partial: bool,\n    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub fn plan_search_scatter(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        let selected = replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone();\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n///\n/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\npub fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    floor: u64,\n    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n\n    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n        shard_count,\n        group,\n        rf,\n        query_seq,\n        index,\n        floor,\n        version_checker,\n    )?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        // Filter by version floor, then rotate by query_seq\n        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n            .iter()\n            .filter(|node_id| {\n                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n                version >= floor\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        if eligible.is_empty() {\n            return None;\n        }\n\n        let selected = eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()];\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n///\n/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\npub fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    pinned_group: u32,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n        let selected = replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone();\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\npub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n\n    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => {\n                for shard_id in shards {\n                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n                }\n                continue;\n            }\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n        let shard_count = shards.len();\n        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n        let span = info_span!(\n            \"scatter_node\",\n            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n            address = %node.address,\n            shard_count = shard_count,\n        );\n        tasks.push(async move {\n            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n        }.instrument(span));\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n\n    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n        match result {\n            Ok(body) => {\n                for _shard_id in shards {\n                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n                }\n            }\n            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n                deadline_exceeded = true;\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n\n    match policy {\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n            }\n        }\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n\n                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n\n                    // Try each other replica group\n                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n                        }\n\n                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n                                continue;\n                            }\n\n                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n                            for node_id in replicas {\n                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n                                        Ok(body) => {\n                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n                                            break;\n                                        }\n                                        Err(_) => {\n                                            continue; // Try next replica\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n\n                            if fallback_succeeded {\n                                break; // Found a working replica\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Merge fallback results\n                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n\n                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n                        shard_pages,\n                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n                        partial: false,\n                        deadline_exceeded,\n                    });\n                } else {\n                    // Some shards still failed\n                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n\n    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n    if scatter_result.partial {\n        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n\n    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n        offset: req.offset,\n        limit: req.limit,\n        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n        failed_shards,\n    };\n\n    // Span for the merge operation\n    let _span = info_span!(\n        \"merge\",\n        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n        offset = req.offset,\n        limit = req.limit,\n    ).entered();\n\n    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\npub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n    match query {\n        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n            }\n            terms\n        }\n        _ => Vec::new(),\n    }\n}\n\n/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\npub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: &PreflightRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n    }\n\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => continue,\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let nid = node_id.clone();\n        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n}\n\n/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n    };\n    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n    let mut search_req = req;\n    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Mock client\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\npub struct MockNodeClient {\n    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n    pub delay_ms: u64,\n}\n\nimpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(WriteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n            results: Vec::new(),\n            limit: request.limit,\n            offset: request.offset,\n            total: 0,\n        })\n    }\n\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        let node = node.clone();\n        let task_uid = _request.task_uid;\n        let error = self.errors.get(&node).cloned();\n        async move {\n            if let Some(err) = error {\n                return Err(err);\n            }\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n\n    fn make_test_topology() -> Topology {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 2, 2);\n        for i in 0u32..6 {\n            let rg = if i < 3 { 0 } else { 1 };\n            let mut node = Node::new(NodeId::new(format!(\"node-{i}\")), format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"), rg);\n            node.status = crate::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n            topo.add_node(node);\n        }\n        topo\n    }\n\n    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n        SearchRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(), query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n            offset: 0, limit: 10, filter: None, facets: None,\n            ranking_score: false, body: serde_json::json!({}), global_idf: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_pure_function()     assert!(plan.hedging_eligible);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_group_rotation() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        assert_eq!(plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, &plan.shard_to_node { assert!(g0.nodes().contains(nid)); }\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_hedging() {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 1, 1);\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"n0\".into()), \"http://n0:7700\".into(), 0));\n        assert!(!plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 64).hedging_eligible);\n serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\"}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n        let s = #[test]\n    fn test_extract_query_terms() {\n        assert_eq!(extract_query_terms(&Some(\"hello world hello\".into())), vec![\"hello\", \"world\"]);\n        assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n        let resp = vec![\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 60.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 4500 })]) },\n        ];\n        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&resp);\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_global_idf_empty() {\n        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&[]);\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 0);\n        assert!(g.terms.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n        });\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n        });\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 40000, avg_doc_length: 52.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 4000 })]),\n        });\n        let req = PreflightRequest { index_uid: \"test\".into(), terms: vec![\"search\".into()], filter: None };\n        let g = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"search\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_query_then_fetch() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n        });\n        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n        assert!(!r.degraded);\n        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n    ///\n    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n    ///\n    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n    ///\n    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    ///\n    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3);\n\n        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n\n        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 1000,\n            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 100_000,\n            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 10,\n            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n            filter: None,\n        };\n\n        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n\n        // Verify global aggregation\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n\n        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n\n        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n\n        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n    }\n\n    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n\n        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n            terms: vec![],\n            filter: None,\n        };\n\n        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_partial_failure() {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3);\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n\n        // Node 0 returns valid data\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 50000,\n            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]),\n        });\n\n        // Node 1 returns valid data\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 30000,\n            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n        });\n\n        // Node 2 fails\n        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n\n        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n            terms: vec![\"test\".into()],\n            filter: None,\n        };\n\n        // Should aggregate from successful nodes only\n        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 80000);\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"test\").unwrap().df, 8000);\n    }\n\n    /// Test that to_node_body correctly injects showRankingScore: true and sets limit to offset + limit.\n    #[test]\n    fn test_to_node_body_injects_show_ranking_score() {\n        let req = SearchRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n            query: Some(\"rust programming\".into()),\n            offset: 10,\n            limit: 20,\n            filter: Some(serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")),\n            facets: Some(vec![\"category\".into(), \"tags\".into()]),\n            ranking_score: false, // Client didn't request scores\n            body: serde_json::json!({\"custom\": \"field\"}),\n            global_idf: None,\n        };\n\n        let body = req.to_node_body();\n\n        // showRankingScore must be true unconditionally\n        assert_eq!(body.get(\"showRankingScore\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(true)));\n\n        // limit must be offset + limit (coordinator pagination)\n        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(30)));\n\n        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n\n        // query must be set\n        assert_eq!(body.get(\"q\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"rust programming\")));\n\n        // filter must be set\n        assert_eq!(body.get(\"filter\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")));\n\n        // facets must ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n23\t\n24\t/// A UTC time window like `\"02:00-06:00\"`.\n25\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq)]\n26\tpub struct TimeWindow {\n27\t    /// Start hour+minute in minutes since midnight UTC.\n28\t    pub start_mins: u16,\n29\t    /// End hour+minute in minutes since midnight UTC.\n30\t    pub end_mins: u16,\n31\t}\n32\t\n33\timpl std::fmt::Display for TimeWindow {\n34\t    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {\n35\t        write!(\n36\t            f,\n37\t            \"{:02}:{:02}-{:02}:{:02}\",\n38\t            self.start_mins / 60,\n39\t            self.start_mins % 60,\n40\t            self.end_mins / 60,\n41\t            self.end_mins % 60\n42\t        )\n43\t    }\n44\t}\n45\t\n46\timpl TimeWindow {\n47\t    /// Parse a `\"HH:MM-HH:MM\"` string (UTC).\n48\t    pub fn parse(s: &str) -> Result<Self, String> {\n49\t        let (start, end) = s\n50\t            .split_once('-')\n51\t            .ok_or_else(|| format!(\"expected HH:MM-HH:MM, got {}\", s))?;\n52\t        Ok(TimeWindow {\n53\t            start_mins: Self::parse_hm(start)?,\n54\t            end_mins: Self::parse_hm(end)?,\n55\t        })\n56\t    }\n57\t\n58\t    fn parse_hm(hm: &str) -> Result<u16, String> {\n59\t        let (h, m) = hm\n60\t            .split_once(':')\n61\t            .ok_or_else(|| format!(\"expected HH:MM, got {}\", hm))?;\n62\t        let h: u16 = h.parse().map_err(|_| format!(\"invalid hour: {}\", h))?;\n63\t        let m: u16 = m.parse().map_err(|_| format!(\"invalid minute: {}\", m))?;\n64\t        if h >= 24 || m >= 60 {\n65\t            return Err(format!(\"time out of range: {}\", hm));\n66\t        }\n67\t        Ok(h * 60 + m)\n68\t    }\n69\t\n70\t    /// Does `utc_minutes` (minutes since midnight UTC) fall inside this window?\n71\t    pub fn contains(&self, utc_minutes: u16) -> bool {\n72\t        if self.start_mins <= self.end_mins {\n73\t            utc_minutes >= self.start_mins && utc_minutes < self.end_mins\n74\t        } else {\n75\t            // Wraps midnight, e.g. 22:00-06:00\n76\t            utc_minutes >= self.start_mins || utc_minutes < self.end_mins\n77\t        }\n78\t    }\n79\t}\n80\t\n81\t/// Resharding configuration (plan §13.1 + schedule window guard).\n82\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n83\tpub struct ReshardingConfig {\n84\t    #[serde(default = \"default_true\")]\n85\t    pub enabled: bool,\n86\t    #[serde(default = \"default_backfill_concurrency\")]\n87\t    pub Vec<String>,\n100\t}\n101\t\n102\tfn default_backfill_concurrency() -> usize {\n103\t    4\n104\t}\n105\tfn default_backfill_batch_size() -> usize {\n106\t    1000\n107\t}\n108\tfn default_true() ->
